input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.7.2
            TITLE: bodywork height is not restricted when the bodywork is located:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.7.2: Bodywork height is not restricted when the Bodywork is located:
T.7.7.2 Bodywork height is not restricted when the Bodywork is located: 
• Between the transverse vertical planes positioned at the front and rear axle centerlines 
• Inside two vertical fore and aft planes 400 mm outboard from the centerline on each 
side of the vehicle

final_answer: rule T.7.7.2: Bodywork height is not restricted when the Bodywork is located: T.7.7.2 Bodywork height is not restricted when the Bodywork is located: • Between the transverse vertical planes positioned at the front and rear axle centerlines • Inside two vertical fore and aft planes 400 mm outboard from the centerline on each side of the vehicle
